rationale.summary: This PR adds a CLI-side reachability helper for checking whether a worker host responds to ICMP. The gathered walkthrough describes a new Python helper that wraps the system ping command and returns a boolean from the process exit code. No conversation transcript was available, so intent is inferred only from the walkthrough evidence.

keyPoints.point: The changed surface is a new CLI helper in cli/net_check.py for worker reachability checks.
The helper invokes the system ping command and reports success based on the subprocess return code.

reasons: no blocking risk band, adherence failure, or L4-pending cohort
